steps.title: Translate each animal's land use
steps.content: Each horse requires $2$ acres, so $h$ horses require $2h$ acres. Each goat requires $1$ acre, so $g$ goats require $g$ acres.

steps.title: Write the total
steps.content: The total land required is $21$ acres, so $$2h+g=21.$$ This is equivalent to $$g+2h=21.$$
